description: Create a Project for a given company ID. When a Project is successfully created, you will be returned the new Project UUID.

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

schema.description: When a Project is successfully created, you will be returned the new Project UUID.

items.description: Response schema containing a unique identifier.

schema.description: Request body schema for creating a new Project.

status.description: Controls Project visibility and filtering. `active` - Project is currently in progress. `pending` - Project is planned but not started. `inactive` - Project is no longer active.

group_ids.description: UUID references to the Groups this Project should be available to.

start_date.description: Project's start date. Required if `status` is `active`.

timezone.description: The timezone to use for scheduling outbound messages for the Project. If not provided, the Group timezone will be used.

color.description: Hexadecimal color code for the Project. Helps with categorization and visual distinction.

daily_start_time.description: Default time the Project's workday begins. Must follow `HH:MM am/pm` format. Allowed increments: 15 minutes.

daily_end_time.description: Default time the Project's workday ends. Must follow `HH:MM am/pm` format. Allowed increments: 15 minutes.

project_number.description: A unique identifier for the Project.

est_end_date.description: Estimated end date for the Project.

closed_date.description: If loading already closed jobs for historical tracking, this field can be populated.

address_1.description: First part of the Project's address.

address_2.description: Second part of the Project's address (e.g., Apartment, Suite, Unit).

zipcode.description: The Zip/Postal Code for the Project.

bid_rate.description: The bid rate for the Project.

percent_complete.description: The percentage of the Project that is complete.

customer_name.description: Name of the customer associated with the Project.

project_type.description: Any categorical classifier you use internally to label your Projects.

tag_instances.description: Tags can be used as categorical labels or to define requirements for people assigned to the Project.

categories.description: Categories define buckets for resource assignments. Each Category can have nested Subcategories.

subcategories.description: A nested layer of classification inside the Category.

wage_overrides.description: Sets an hourly wage rate for specific Job Titles on this Project.

rate.description: Hourly wage rate for the Job Title.

roles.description: Assigns specific People to Roles on the Project. Useful for defining responsibilities and for notifications.

person_id.description: UUID of the Person assigned to the Role.

job_title_id.description: UUID of the Job Title for the Role. If omitted, the Person's default Job Title is used.
